### Friends of Probability

::: {.grid}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Lisa Goldberg"
    url    = "https://econ.berkeley.edu/profile/lisa-goldberg"
    image  = "/images/lisa-goldberg.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor of the Practice of Economics"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Dan-Virgil Voiculescu"
    url    = "https://math.berkeley.edu/~dvv/"
    image  = "/images/dvv_1.jpg"
    affil  = "Professor"
>}}

{{<faculty-card
    name   = "Nikita Zhivotovskiy"
    url    = "https://sites.google.com/view/nikitazhivotovskiy/"
    image  = "/images/nikita-zhivotovskiy.jpg"
    affil  = "Assistant Professor"
>}}

:::
